ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., clinical trial, laboratory experiment) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Lead researcher for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current state of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group to which the subject belongs */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the subject is participating in */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the subject (e.g., age, sex, medical history) */,
  "subject_group" TEXT /* Category of the subject (e.g., control, treatment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition is associated with */,
  "condition_category" TEXT /* Category of the condition (e.g., environmental, medical) */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Specific value associated with the condition (e.g., temperature, dosage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the variable (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "variable_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable (e.g., seconds, milligrams) */,
  "variable_range" TEXT /* Valid range of values for the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the data point belongs to */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition the data point is associated with */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the data point represents */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_point_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was collected */,
  "data_point_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistical model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the model is associated with */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the statistical model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistical model the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., coefficient, intercept) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Actual value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES statistical_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, statistician, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Job title or position of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, analyze) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device or platform used to access the experiment or data */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the experiment or data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
